tasks.description: Master Launcher + Full System Smoke Test: create start_hermes_full.sh, full_system_test.py, update palace/README.md
tasks.notes: Completed: scripts created, README updated with one-command and voice commands. System now has clear startup path.

tasks.notes: Welcome sequence speaks full message, farm status, 5 commands, runs STT test. Hooked into start_hermes_full.sh. README updated.

tasks.description: Git Commit & Push Everything across project-q, Hermes-Elysium-Qt-Native, hermes-elysium, palace
tasks.notes: Committed changes in all folders and pushed. Repos updated with hashes 5d3aa0d project-q, 1656beb hermes-elysium, bfc2cdd Hermes-Elysium-Qt-Native, cbf4872 palace.

tasks.description: Fix Herald Coordinator Auto-Start + Full Reliability: debug C++ binary path, add port preflight, fix launcher to start coordinator before workers, update health score to -40 for dead coordinator
tasks.notes: Three root causes: (1) launcher referenced herald_coordinator.py (doesn't exist) instead of build/project-qd C++ binary, (2) no port preflight to kill stale processes, (3) welcome_sequence.py not found hung the startup. Fixed: corrected binary paths to build/project-qd --coordinator --tcp-port 9100 --udp-port 9101 --node-name garuda, added _kill_stale_on_ports() and _verify_coordinator_bin() preflights, coordinator now starts first with port verification, health score penalty increased from -20 to -40 for dead coordinator. End-to-end verified: start/stop works clean, coordinator + worker + hermes-python all start in order, health score drops to 60 when coordinator is dead.

tasks.description: Clean Logs + Production-Ready Launcher: split coordinator/worker debug from errors, add --quiet flag, final validation pass
tasks.notes: Split coordinator/worker logs: stderr goes to coordinator.log, stdout debug to coordinator-debug.log. Added --quiet/-q flag that suppresses everything except errors. Auto-rotates logs >1MB. Final validation 15/15 tests pass, health score 100, stop/start/status all clean. Daily-driver ready.
